      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function setupGlobalEventListeners() {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    // Centralized event listener for all changes\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = event.target.value;\r\n            console.log('Season changed to:', selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            // Update analysis based on selection state\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                    // Team + specific season selected\r\n                    console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                    console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    // Centralized event listener for all changes\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = event.target.value;\r\n            console.log('Season changed to:', selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            // Update analysis based on selection state\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                    // Team + specific season selected\r\n                    console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                    console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update league buttons\n */\nfunction updateLeagueButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(leagues =\u003e {\n            const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \n                       value=\"${league}\" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\n            \n            // Auto-select highest league if none selected\n            const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"league\"]');\n            if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 leagues.length \u003e 0) {\n                const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();\n                const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];\n                const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"league\"][value=\"${highestLeague}\"]&#96;);\n                if (highestInput) {\n                    highestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.league = highestLeague;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading leagues:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading leagues:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update league buttons\n */\nfunction updateLeagueButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(leagues =\u003e {\n            const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \n                       value=\"${league}\" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\n            \n            // Auto-select highest league if none selected\n            const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"league\"]');\n            if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 leagues.length \u003e 0) {\n                const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();\n                const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];\n                const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"league\"][value=\"${highestLeague}\"]&#96;);\n                if (highestInput) {\n                    highestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.league = highestLeague;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading leagues:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading leagues:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTeamSelect(teams) {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    // Add event listener to new select\r\n    newSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedTeam = this.value;\r\n        console.log('Selected team (legacy):', selectedTeam);\r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n            updateMessageVisibility();\r\n            updateTeamHistory(selectedTeam);\r\n    \r\n            updateLeagueComparison(selectedTeam);\r\n            loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n            \r\n            // Also trigger modern analysis if a season is already selected\r\n            const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n            if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                // Team + specific season selected\r\n                console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            } else {\r\n                // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n            console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n            updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            updateMessageVisibility();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

            "text": "/**\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": " * Update season buttons\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": " * Original function signature preserved exactly\r"

            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": " */"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    // Add event listener to new select\r\n    newSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedTeam = this.value;\r\n        console.log('Selected team (legacy):', selectedTeam);\r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n            updateMessageVisibility();\r\n            updateTeamHistory(selectedTeam);\r\n    \r\n            updateLeagueComparison(selectedTeam);\r\n            loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n            \r\n            // Also trigger modern analysis if a season is already selected\r\n            const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n            if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                // Team + specific season selected\r\n                console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            } else {\r\n                // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n            console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n            updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            updateMessageVisibility();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class SimpleFilterManager {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Set up event listeners for filter buttons\r\n     */\r\n    setupButtonEventListeners() {\r\n        // Use event delegation for all filter buttons\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            if (target.name === 'league') {\r\n                const league = target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏆 League changed:', league);\r\n                this.updateState({ league, season: '', week: '', team: '' });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'season') {\r\n                const season = target.value;\r\n                console.log('📅 Season changed:', season);\r\n                this.updateState({ season, week: '' });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'week') {\r\n                const week = target.value;\r\n                console.log('📆 Week changed:', week);\r\n                this.updateState({ week });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'team') {\r\n                const team = target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏢 Team changed:', team);\r\n                this.updateState({ team });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Handle team dropdown for team mode\r\n        if (this.mode === 'team') {\r\n            const teamSelect = document.getElementById('teamSelect');\r\n            if (teamSelect) {\r\n                teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n                    const team = event.target.value;\r\n                    console.log('🏢 Team dropdown changed:', team);\r\n                    this.updateState({ team, season: '', week: '' });\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        console.log('✅ SimpleFilterManager: Button event listeners set up');\r\n    }",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 680,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 681,
            "text": "     * Update state and trigger URL update\r"

            "lineNumber": 682,

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Set up event listeners for filter buttons\r\n     */\r\n    setupButtonEventListeners() {\r\n        // Use event delegation for all filter buttons\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            if (target.name === 'league') {\r\n                const league = target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏆 League changed:', league);\r\n                this.updateState({ league, season: '', week: '', team: '' });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'season') {\r\n                const season = target.value;\r\n                console.log('📅 Season changed:', season);\r\n                this.updateState({ season, week: '' });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'week') {\r\n                const week = target.value;\r\n                console.log('📆 Week changed:', week);\r\n                this.updateState({ week });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'team') {\r\n                const team = target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏢 Team changed:', team);\r\n                this.updateState({ team });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Handle team dropdown for team mode\r\n        if (this.mode === 'team') {\r\n            const teamSelect = document.getElementById('teamSelect');\r\n            if (teamSelect) {\r\n                teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n                    const team = event.target.value;\r\n                    console.log('🏢 Team dropdown changed:', team);\r\n                    this.updateState({ team, season: '', week: '' });\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        console.log('✅ SimpleFilterManager: Button event listeners set up');\r\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class APITestApp {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Setup filter event listeners\r\n     */\r\n    setupFilterEventListeners() {\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', async (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const { name, value } = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Filter changed:', { name, value });\r\n            \r\n            if (['season', 'league', 'week', 'team', 'player'].includes(name)) {\r\n                const oldValue = this.currentState[name];\r\n                this.currentState[name] = value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log('Updated state:', this.currentState);\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL state\r\n                this.urlStateManager.setState({ [name]: value });\r\n                \r\n                // Update dependent filters\r\n                if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;${name} changed from '${oldValue}' to '${value}', updating dependent filters...&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Clear dependent selections first\r\n                    if (name === 'season') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('league');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    } else if (name === 'league') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Then update options\r\n                    await this.updateWeekOptions();\r\n                    await this.updateTeamOptions();\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Re-render content\r\n                if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                    await this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Setup filter event listeners\r\n     */\r\n    setupFilterEventListeners() {\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', async (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const { name, value } = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Filter changed:', { name, value });\r\n            \r\n            if (['season', 'league', 'week', 'team', 'player'].includes(name)) {\r\n                const oldValue = this.currentState[name];\r\n                this.currentState[name] = value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log('Updated state:', this.currentState);\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL state\r\n                this.urlStateManager.setState({ [name]: value });\r\n                \r\n                // Update dependent filters\r\n                if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;${name} changed from '${oldValue}' to '${value}', updating dependent filters...&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Clear dependent selections first\r\n                    if (name === 'season') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('league');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    } else if (name === 'league') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Then update options\r\n                    await this.updateWeekOptions();\r\n                    await this.updateTeamOptions();\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Re-render content\r\n                if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                    await this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }",

          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "### 3. Enhanced FilterManager (&#96;core/filter-manager.js&#96;)\r\nUpdated to use the event system for intelligent state change detection and routing.\r\n\r\n**New Features:**\r\n- **Change detection** - Identifies exactly what changed between states\r\n- **Smart routing** - Routes only relevant changes to interested blocks\r\n- **Block status monitoring** - Tracks block rendering status\r\n- **Error coordination** - Handles and reports block errors\r\n\r\n## Event Flow Architecture\r\n\r\n### Current vs Enhanced Flow\r\n\r\n**Before (Linear):**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nUser Action → FilterManager → ContentRenderer → All Blocks Re-render\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**After (Event-Driven):**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nUser Action → FilterManager → SmartEventRouter → Only Interested Blocks Update\r\n                ↓\r\n            EventBus → Cross-Block Communication\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### Detailed Event Flow\r\n\r\n1. **User selects different team:**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   TeamSelect.onChange → FilterManager.handleTeamChange\r\n                      ↓\r\n   FilterManager.detectStateChanges → ['team' change detected]\r\n                      ↓\r\n   SmartEventRouter.routeFilterChange('team', data)\r\n                      ↓\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:team-history', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:league-comparison', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:clutch-analysis', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:consistency-metrics', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:special-matches', data)\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **User selects different week:**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   WeekSelect.onChange → FilterManager.handleWeekChange\r\n                      ↓\r\n   FilterManager.detectStateChanges → ['week' change detected]\r\n                      ↓\r\n   SmartEventRouter.routeFilterChange('week', data)\r\n                      ↓\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-week:clutch-analysis', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-week:special-matches', data)\r\n   // team-history and league-comparison are NOT notified!\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Performance Benefits\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "'filter-changed-league': ['league-comparison']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "### 3. Enhanced FilterManager (&#96;core/filter-manager.js&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "Updated to use the event system for intelligent state change detection and routing.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "**New Features:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "- **Change detection** - Identifies exactly what changed between states\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "- **Smart routing** - Routes only relevant changes to interested blocks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "- **Block status monitoring** - Tracks block rendering status\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "- **Error coordination** - Handles and reports block errors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "## Event Flow Architecture\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "### Current vs Enhanced Flow\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "**Before (Linear):**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "User Action → FilterManager → ContentRenderer → All Blocks Re-render\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "**After (Event-Driven):**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "User Action → FilterManager → SmartEventRouter → Only Interested Blocks Update\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "                ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "            EventBus → Cross-Block Communication\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "### Detailed Event Flow\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "1. **User selects different team:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "   TeamSelect.onChange → FilterManager.handleTeamChange\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "                      ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "   FilterManager.detectStateChanges → ['team' change detected]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "                      ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "   SmartEventRouter.routeFilterChange('team', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "                      ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:team-history', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:league-comparison', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:clutch-analysis', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:consistency-metrics', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:special-matches', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "2. **User selects different week:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "   WeekSelect.onChange → FilterManager.handleWeekChange\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "                      ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "   FilterManager.detectStateChanges → ['week' change detected]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "                      ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "   SmartEventRouter.routeFilterChange('week', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "                      ↓\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-week:clutch-analysis', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-week:special-matches', data)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "   // team-history and league-comparison are NOT notified!\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "## Performance Benefits\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "### Before Enhancement\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "### 3. Enhanced FilterManager (&#96;core/filter-manager.js&#96;)\r\nUpdated to use the event system for intelligent state change detection and routing.\r\n\r\n**New Features:**\r\n- **Change detection** - Identifies exactly what changed between states\r\n- **Smart routing** - Routes only relevant changes to interested blocks\r\n- **Block status monitoring** - Tracks block rendering status\r\n- **Error coordination** - Handles and reports block errors\r\n\r\n## Event Flow Architecture\r\n\r\n### Current vs Enhanced Flow\r\n\r\n**Before (Linear):**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nUser Action → FilterManager → ContentRenderer → All Blocks Re-render\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n**After (Event-Driven):**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\nUser Action → FilterManager → SmartEventRouter → Only Interested Blocks Update\r\n                ↓\r\n            EventBus → Cross-Block Communication\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### Detailed Event Flow\r\n\r\n1. **User selects different team:**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   TeamSelect.onChange → FilterManager.handleTeamChange\r\n                      ↓\r\n   FilterManager.detectStateChanges → ['team' change detected]\r\n                      ↓\r\n   SmartEventRouter.routeFilterChange('team', data)\r\n                      ↓\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:team-history', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:league-comparison', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:clutch-analysis', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:consistency-metrics', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-team:special-matches', data)\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **User selects different week:**\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n   WeekSelect.onChange → FilterManager.handleWeekChange\r\n                      ↓\r\n   FilterManager.detectStateChanges → ['week' change detected]\r\n                      ↓\r\n   SmartEventRouter.routeFilterChange('week', data)\r\n                      ↓\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-week:clutch-analysis', data)\r\n   EventBus.emit('filter-changed-week:special-matches', data)\r\n   // team-history and league-comparison are NOT notified!\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n## Performance Benefits\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 108
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 47
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "docs/ENHANCED_LISTENER_SYSTEM.md"
      },
      "score": 0.30859375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update team buttons\n */\nfunction updateTeamButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(teams =\u003e {\n            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Update team buttons\n */\nfunction updateTeamButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(teams =\u003e {\n            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueStatsApp {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    setupEventListeners() {\r\n        // Listen for filter changes from the filter controls block\r\n        document.addEventListener('filterChange', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            this.handleStateChange(event.detail);\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // Listen for external events (data source changes, palette changes)\r\n        window.handleDataSourceChange = () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('📊 Data source changed - refreshing content');\r\n            this.renderContent();\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        window.handlePaletteChange = () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('🎨 Palette changed - refreshing content');\r\n            this.renderContent();\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        // For backward compatibility\r\n        window.refreshAllCharts = () =\u003e {\r\n            this.renderContent();\r\n        };\r\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "    }"

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    setupEventListeners() {\r\n        // Listen for filter changes from the filter controls block\r\n        document.addEventListener('filterChange', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            this.handleStateChange(event.detail);\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // Listen for external events (data source changes, palette changes)\r\n        window.handleDataSourceChange = () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('📊 Data source changed - refreshing content');\r\n            this.renderContent();\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        window.handlePaletteChange = () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('🎨 Palette changed - refreshing content');\r\n            this.renderContent();\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        // For backward compatibility\r\n        window.refreshAllCharts = () =\u003e {\r\n            this.renderContent();\r\n        };\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Enhanced Listener System\r\n\r\n## Overview\r\nThe Enhanced Listener System introduces event-driven architecture to the League Analyzer frontend, enabling intelligent cross-block communication and selective updates based on filter changes.\r\n\r\n## Core Components\r\n\r\n### 1. EventBus (&#96;core/event-bus.js&#96;)\r\nCentral event coordination system that manages all cross-component communication.\r\n\r\n**Key Features:**\r\n- **Priority-based listeners** - Higher priority listeners execute first\r\n- **One-time subscriptions** - Automatic cleanup for temporary listeners\r\n- **Event logging** - Debug history of recent events\r\n- **Error handling** - Isolated error handling per listener\r\n- **Debug mode** - Comprehensive logging for development\r\n\r\n**API:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n// Subscribe to events\r\nconst unsubscribe = EventBus.subscribe('event-type', callback, context, options);\r\n\r\n// Emit events\r\nEventBus.emit('event-type', data, options);\r\n\r\n// One-time subscription\r\nEventBus.once('event-type', callback, context);\r\n\r\n// Debug information\r\nEventBus.debugInfo();\r\nEventBus.getStats();\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 2. SmartEventRouter (&#96;core/smart-event-router.js&#96;)\r\nIntelligent routing system that determines which blocks should respond to which events.\r\n\r\n**Key Features:**\r\n- **Selective routing** - Only notifies interested blocks\r\n- **Event mapping** - Pre-configured relationships between events and blocks\r\n- **Dynamic interests** - Blocks can update their event interests at runtime\r\n- **Data sharing coordination** - Routes data between blocks that can benefit from sharing\r\n\r\n**Event Mapping:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n'filter-changed-team': ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\r\n'filter-changed-season': ['league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']  \r\n'filter-changed-week': ['clutch-analysis', 'special-matches'] // team-history doesn't care about weeks\r\n'filter-changed-league': ['league-comparison']\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Enhanced Listener System\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## Overview\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "The Enhanced Listener System introduces event-driven architecture to the League Analyzer frontend, enabling intelligent cross-block communication and selective updates based on filter changes.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "## Core Components\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "### 1. EventBus (&#96;core/event-bus.js&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "Central event coordination system that manages all cross-component communication.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "**Key Features:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "- **Priority-based listeners** - Higher priority listeners execute first\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "- **One-time subscriptions** - Automatic cleanup for temporary listeners\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "- **Event logging** - Debug history of recent events\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "- **Error handling** - Isolated error handling per listener\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "- **Debug mode** - Comprehensive logging for development\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "**API:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "// Subscribe to events\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "const unsubscribe = EventBus.subscribe('event-type', callback, context, options);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "// Emit events\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "EventBus.emit('event-type', data, options);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "// One-time subscription\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "EventBus.once('event-type', callback, context);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "// Debug information\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "EventBus.debugInfo();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "EventBus.getStats();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "### 2. SmartEventRouter (&#96;core/smart-event-router.js&#96;)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "Intelligent routing system that determines which blocks should respond to which events.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "**Key Features:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "- **Selective routing** - Only notifies interested blocks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "- **Event mapping** - Pre-configured relationships between events and blocks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "- **Dynamic interests** - Blocks can update their event interests at runtime\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "- **Data sharing coordination** - Routes data between blocks that can benefit from sharing\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "**Event Mapping:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "'filter-changed-team': ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "'filter-changed-season': ['league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']  \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "'filter-changed-week': ['clutch-analysis', 'special-matches'] // team-history doesn't care about weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "'filter-changed-league': ['league-comparison']\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "### 3. Enhanced FilterManager (&#96;core/filter-manager.js&#96;)\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# Enhanced Listener System\r\n\r\n## Overview\r\nThe Enhanced Listener System introduces event-driven architecture to the League Analyzer frontend, enabling intelligent cross-block communication and selective updates based on filter changes.\r\n\r\n## Core Components\r\n\r\n### 1. EventBus (&#96;core/event-bus.js&#96;)\r\nCentral event coordination system that manages all cross-component communication.\r\n\r\n**Key Features:**\r\n- **Priority-based listeners** - Higher priority listeners execute first\r\n- **One-time subscriptions** - Automatic cleanup for temporary listeners\r\n- **Event logging** - Debug history of recent events\r\n- **Error handling** - Isolated error handling per listener\r\n- **Debug mode** - Comprehensive logging for development\r\n\r\n**API:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n// Subscribe to events\r\nconst unsubscribe = EventBus.subscribe('event-type', callback, context, options);\r\n\r\n// Emit events\r\nEventBus.emit('event-type', data, options);\r\n\r\n// One-time subscription\r\nEventBus.once('event-type', callback, context);\r\n\r\n// Debug information\r\nEventBus.debugInfo();\r\nEventBus.getStats();\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### 2. SmartEventRouter (&#96;core/smart-event-router.js&#96;)\r\nIntelligent routing system that determines which blocks should respond to which events.\r\n\r\n**Key Features:**\r\n- **Selective routing** - Only notifies interested blocks\r\n- **Event mapping** - Pre-configured relationships between events and blocks\r\n- **Dynamic interests** - Blocks can update their event interests at runtime\r\n- **Data sharing coordination** - Routes data between blocks that can benefit from sharing\r\n\r\n**Event Mapping:**\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n'filter-changed-team': ['team-history', 'league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']\r\n'filter-changed-season': ['league-comparison', 'clutch-analysis', 'consistency-metrics', 'special-matches']  \r\n'filter-changed-week': ['clutch-analysis', 'special-matches'] // team-history doesn't care about weeks\r\n'filter-changed-league': ['league-comparison']\r\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 51
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "docs/ENHANCED_LISTENER_SYSTEM.md"
      },
      "score": 0.2646484375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class SimpleFilterManager {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Dispatch filter change event for content rendering\r\n     */\r\n    dispatchFilterChangeEvent(state) {\r\n        const event = new CustomEvent('filterChange', {\r\n            detail: state,\r\n            bubbles: true\r\n        });\r\n        document.dispatchEvent(event);\r\n        console.log('📢 SimpleFilterManager: Dispatched filterChange event:', state);\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Dispatch filter change event for content rendering\r\n     */\r\n    dispatchFilterChangeEvent(state) {\r\n        const event = new CustomEvent('filterChange', {\r\n            detail: state,\r\n            bubbles: true\r\n        });\r\n        document.dispatchEvent(event);\r\n        console.log('📢 SimpleFilterManager: Dispatched filterChange event:', state);\r\n    }\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "# Phase 3 Filter Fix: Content Blocks Now Update on Filter Changes\r\n\r\n## 🐛 **Problem Identified**\r\nThe content blocks were only updating when refreshing the browser, not when changing the team dropdown or season selector. This was because:\r\n\r\n1. **Event Handler Competition**: Legacy event handlers and new Phase 3 handlers were competing\r\n2. **Missing State Propagation**: Filter changes weren't properly triggering content block updates\r\n3. **Initialization Timing**: Components weren't fully connected during startup\r\n\r\n## 🔧 **Solution Implemented**\r\n\r\n### **New File: &#96;team-stats-app-phase3-fixed.js&#96;**\r\n\r\n#### **Key Improvements:**\r\n\r\n1. **🎯 Dedicated Event Listeners**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   // Team selection change\r\n   teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n       const teamName = event.target.value;\r\n       console.log('🏢 Team changed (Phase 3):', teamName);\r\n       this.setState({ team: teamName, season: '', week: '' });\r\n   });\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **🔄 Enhanced State Management**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   setState(newState) {\r\n       // Update URL state\r\n       this.urlStateManager.setState(newState);\r\n       \r\n       // Force content re-render\r\n       const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();\r\n       this.contentRenderer.lastRenderedState = {};\r\n       this.contentRenderer.renderContent(currentState);\r\n   }\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n3. **⏱️ Improved Initialization Timing**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   // Longer delay to ensure all components are ready\r\n   setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n       window.teamStatsApp.initialize().catch(error =\u003e {\r\n           console.error('❌ Failed to initialize TeamStatsAppPhase3:', error);\r\n       });\r\n   }, 200);\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n4. **🔧 Better Event Handler Setup**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   setupPhase3EventListeners() {\r\n       // Clear, dedicated event handlers that ensure content blocks update\r\n       // Team, season, and week changes all properly trigger state updates\r\n   }\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### **Enhanced Debug Capabilities**\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "# Phase 3 Filter Fix: Content Blocks Now Update on Filter Changes\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "## 🐛 **Problem Identified**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "The content blocks were only updating when refreshing the browser, not when changing the team dropdown or season selector. This was because:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "1. **Event Handler Competition**: Legacy event handlers and new Phase 3 handlers were competing\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "2. **Missing State Propagation**: Filter changes weren't properly triggering content block updates\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "3. **Initialization Timing**: Components weren't fully connected during startup\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "## 🔧 **Solution Implemented**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "### **New File: &#96;team-stats-app-phase3-fixed.js&#96;**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "#### **Key Improvements:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "1. **🎯 Dedicated Event Listeners**:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "   // Team selection change\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "   teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "       const teamName = event.target.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "       console.log('🏢 Team changed (Phase 3):', teamName);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "       this.setState({ team: teamName, season: '', week: '' });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "   });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "2. **🔄 Enhanced State Management**:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "   setState(newState) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "       // Update URL state\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "       this.urlStateManager.setState(newState);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "       \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "       // Force content re-render\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "       const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "       this.contentRenderer.lastRenderedState = {};\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "       this.contentRenderer.renderContent(currentState);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "   }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "3. **⏱️ Improved Initialization Timing**:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "   // Longer delay to ensure all components are ready\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "   setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "       window.teamStatsApp.initialize().catch(error =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "           console.error('❌ Failed to initialize TeamStatsAppPhase3:', error);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "       });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "   }, 200);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "4. **🔧 Better Event Handler Setup**:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "   setupPhase3EventListeners() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "       // Clear, dedicated event handlers that ensure content blocks update\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "       // Team, season, and week changes all properly trigger state updates\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "   }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "### **Enhanced Debug Capabilities**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "#### **New Debug Functions:**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "- **&#96;debugTeamStats()&#96;**: Shows complete system state\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "# Phase 3 Filter Fix: Content Blocks Now Update on Filter Changes\r\n\r\n## 🐛 **Problem Identified**\r\nThe content blocks were only updating when refreshing the browser, not when changing the team dropdown or season selector. This was because:\r\n\r\n1. **Event Handler Competition**: Legacy event handlers and new Phase 3 handlers were competing\r\n2. **Missing State Propagation**: Filter changes weren't properly triggering content block updates\r\n3. **Initialization Timing**: Components weren't fully connected during startup\r\n\r\n## 🔧 **Solution Implemented**\r\n\r\n### **New File: &#96;team-stats-app-phase3-fixed.js&#96;**\r\n\r\n#### **Key Improvements:**\r\n\r\n1. **🎯 Dedicated Event Listeners**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   // Team selection change\r\n   teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n       const teamName = event.target.value;\r\n       console.log('🏢 Team changed (Phase 3):', teamName);\r\n       this.setState({ team: teamName, season: '', week: '' });\r\n   });\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n2. **🔄 Enhanced State Management**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   setState(newState) {\r\n       // Update URL state\r\n       this.urlStateManager.setState(newState);\r\n       \r\n       // Force content re-render\r\n       const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();\r\n       this.contentRenderer.lastRenderedState = {};\r\n       this.contentRenderer.renderContent(currentState);\r\n   }\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n3. **⏱️ Improved Initialization Timing**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   // Longer delay to ensure all components are ready\r\n   setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n       window.teamStatsApp.initialize().catch(error =\u003e {\r\n           console.error('❌ Failed to initialize TeamStatsAppPhase3:', error);\r\n       });\r\n   }, 200);\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n4. **🔧 Better Event Handler Setup**:\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;javascript\r\n   setupPhase3EventListeners() {\r\n       // Clear, dedicated event handlers that ensure content blocks update\r\n       // Team, season, and week changes all properly trigger state updates\r\n   }\r\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\r\n\r\n### **Enhanced Debug Capabilities**\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "docs/archive/PHASE_3_FILTER_FIX.md"
      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Alias for updateTeamButtons - used by SimpleFilterManager\n */\nfunction updateLeagueTeamButtons(teams) {\n    if (teams) {\n        // If teams array is provided, use it directly \n        console.log('Updating league team buttons with provided teams:', teams);\n        const currentState = { season: '', league: '', week: '', team: '' }; // Get from URL or state\n        \n        const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                   value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n        &#96;).join('');\n        \n        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n    } else {\n        // Fall back to the standard updateTeamButtons\n        updateTeamButtons();\n    }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * Alias for updateTeamButtons - used by SimpleFilterManager\n */\nfunction updateLeagueTeamButtons(teams) {\n    if (teams) {\n        // If teams array is provided, use it directly \n        console.log('Updating league team buttons with provided teams:', teams);\n        const currentState = { season: '', league: '', week: '', team: '' }; // Get from URL or state\n        \n        const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                   value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n        &#96;).join('');\n        \n        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n    } else {\n        // Fall back to the standard updateTeamButtons\n        updateTeamButtons();\n    }\n}",
        "range": {

        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update week buttons\n */\nfunction updateWeekButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) return;\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(weeks =\u003e {\n            const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \n                       value=\"${week}\" ${week == currentState.week ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\n            \n            // Auto-select latest week if none selected\n            const weekInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name=\"week\"]');\n            if (![...weekInputs].some(input =\u003e input.checked) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\n                const latestWeek = Math.max(...weeks);\n                const latestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${latestWeek}\"]&#96;);\n                if (latestInput) {\n                    latestInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.week = latestWeek;\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\n            console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\n            document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            &#96;;\n        });\n}",

        "contents": "class SimpleFilterManager {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Set up event listeners for filter buttons\r\n     */\r\n    setupButtonEventListeners() {\r\n        // Use event delegation for all filter buttons\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            if (target.name === 'league') {\r\n                const league = target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏆 League changed:', league);\r\n                this.updateState({ league, season: '', week: '', team: '' });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'season') {\r\n                const season = target.value;\r\n                console.log('📅 Season changed:', season);\r\n                this.updateState({ season, week: '' });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'week') {\r\n                const week = target.value;\r\n                console.log('📆 Week changed:', week);\r\n                this.updateState({ week });\r\n            } else if (target.name === 'team') {\r\n                const team = target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏢 Team changed:', team);\r\n                this.updateState({ team });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Handle team dropdown for team mode\r\n        if (this.mode === 'team') {\r\n            const teamSelect = document.getElementById('teamSelect');\r\n            if (teamSelect) {\r\n                teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n                    const team = event.target.value;\r\n                    console.log('🏢 Team dropdown changed:', team);\r\n                    this.updateState({ team, season: '', week: '' });\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        console.log('✅ SimpleFilterManager: Button event listeners set up');\r\n    }",

        "contents": "class APITestApp {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Setup filter event listeners\r\n     */\r\n    setupFilterEventListeners() {\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', async (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const { name, value } = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Filter changed:', { name, value });\r\n            \r\n            if (['season', 'league', 'week', 'team', 'player'].includes(name)) {\r\n                const oldValue = this.currentState[name];\r\n                this.currentState[name] = value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log('Updated state:', this.currentState);\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL state\r\n                this.urlStateManager.setState({ [name]: value });\r\n                \r\n                // Update dependent filters\r\n                if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;${name} changed from '${oldValue}' to '${value}', updating dependent filters...&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Clear dependent selections first\r\n                    if (name === 'season') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('league');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    } else if (name === 'league') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Then update options\r\n                    await this.updateWeekOptions();\r\n                    await this.updateTeamOptions();\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Re-render content\r\n                if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                    await this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Setup filter event listeners\r\n     */\r\n    setupFilterEventListeners() {\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', async (event) =\u003e {\r\n            const { name, value } = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Filter changed:', { name, value });\r\n            \r\n            if (['season', 'league', 'week', 'team', 'player'].includes(name)) {\r\n                const oldValue = this.currentState[name];\r\n                this.currentState[name] = value;\r\n                \r\n                console.log('Updated state:', this.currentState);\r\n                \r\n                // Update URL state\r\n                this.urlStateManager.setState({ [name]: value });\r\n                \r\n                // Update dependent filters\r\n                if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;${name} changed from '${oldValue}' to '${value}', updating dependent filters...&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Clear dependent selections first\r\n                    if (name === 'season') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('league');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    } else if (name === 'league') {\r\n                        this.clearSelection('week');\r\n                        this.clearSelection('team');\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Then update options\r\n                    await this.updateWeekOptions();\r\n                    await this.updateTeamOptions();\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Re-render content\r\n                if (this.contentRenderer) {\r\n                    await this.contentRenderer.renderContent(this.currentState);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

        "contents": "class TeamStatsApp {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Set up event listeners that ensure content blocks update properly\r\n     */\r\n    setupEventListeners() {\r\n        console.log('🔧 Setting up event listeners...');\r\n        \r\n        // Team selection change\r\n        const teamSelect = document.getElementById('teamSelect');\r\n        if (teamSelect) {\r\n            teamSelect.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n                const teamName = event.target.value;\r\n                console.log('🏢 Team changed:', teamName);\r\n                \r\n                if (teamName) {\r\n                    this.setState({\r\n                        team: teamName,\r\n                        season: '', // Clear dependent filters\r\n                        week: ''\r\n                    });\r\n                } else {\r\n                    this.setState({\r\n                        team: '',\r\n                        season: '',\r\n                        week: ''\r\n                    });\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            console.log('✅ Team select listener attached');\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Season button changes (delegated event handling)\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            if (event.target.name === 'season') {\r\n                const season = event.target.value;\r\n                console.log('📅 Season changed:', season);\r\n                \r\n                this.setState({\r\n                    season: season,\r\n                    week: '' // Clear week when season changes\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // Week button changes (delegated event handling)\r\n        document.addEventListener('change', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            if (event.target.name === 'week') {\r\n                const week = event.target.value;\r\n                console.log('📆 Week changed:', week);\r\n                \r\n                this.setState({\r\n                    week: week\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        console.log('✅ All event listeners set up');\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function setupGlobalEventListeners() {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    // Centralized event listener for all changes\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = event.target.value;\r\n            console.log('Season changed to:', selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            // Update analysis based on selection state\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                    // Team + specific season selected\r\n                    console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                    console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

          {
            "lineNumber": 146,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": " * Initialize the team stats page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": " * Only runs legacy initialization if modern state management is not active\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 149,
            "text": " */"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    // Centralized event listener for all changes\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const selectedSeason = event.target.value;\r\n            console.log('Season changed to:', selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            // Update analysis based on selection state\r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                    // Team + specific season selected\r\n                    console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                    console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                    updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                    loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n                }\r\n            } else {\r\n                // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",

        "contents": "/**\r\n * Simple Filter Manager\r\n * \r\n * Simplified version without complex event bus system\r\n * Just manages filter state and UI synchronization\r\n */\r\n\r\nclass SimpleFilterManager {\r\n    constructor(urlStateManager, mode = 'team') {\r\n        this.urlStateManager = urlStateManager;\r\n        this.mode = mode; // 'team' or 'league'\r\n        this.isInitializing = false;\r\n        this.previousState = {};\r\n        this.availableData = {\r\n            teams: [],\r\n            seasons: [],\r\n            weeks: [],\r\n            leagues: []\r\n        };\r\n        \r\n        // Listen for state changes from URL manager\r\n        this.urlStateManager.onStateChange((state) =\u003e {\r\n            this.handleStateChange(state);\r\n        });\r\n    }",

_**Agent**_

Now I can see the issue! The current implementation only listens for `change` events, which don't trigger when clicking an already-selected radio button. I need to add `click` event listeners that can handle deselection of already-selected buttons. Let me check what pages use this functionality and then implement the solution.

          {
            "lineNumber": 480,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 481,
            "text": "     * Populate week buttons with available weeks\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482,
            "text": "     */\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 483,
            "text": "    async populateWeekButtons(state) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 484,

            "isSignature": true,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Populate season buttons with available seasons\r\n     */\r\n    async populateSeasonButtons(state) {\r\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsSeason');\r\n        if (!container) {\r\n            console.warn('SimpleFilterManager: Season buttons container not found');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if (!this.availableData.seasons || this.availableData.seasons.length === 0) {\r\n            container.innerHTML = '\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003eKeine Saisons verfügbar\u003c/span\u003e';\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Get current state to determine which button should be checked\r\n        const currentState = this.urlStateManager.getState();\r\n        const selectedSeason = currentState.season || '';\r\n        \r\n        // Create season buttons with \"All\" option\r\n        const buttonsHtml = ['All', ...this.availableData.seasons].map(season =\u003e {\r\n            const seasonValue = season === 'All' ? '' : season;\r\n            const isChecked = seasonValue === selectedSeason || (season === 'All' \u0026\u0026 !selectedSeason);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;\r\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"season\" id=\"season_${season}\" \r\n                       value=\"${seasonValue}\" \r\n                       ${isChecked ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"season_${season}\"\u003e${season}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        }).join('');\r\n        \r\n        container.innerHTML = buttonsHtml;\r\n        console.log(&#96;📊 SimpleFilterManager: Populated season buttons with ${this.availableData.seasons.length} seasons, selected: ${selectedSeason}&#96;);\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 699
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 5
          }
